overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City's neon-lit highways and urban corridors at high speed. The journey transitions from elevated highways through covered underpasses to surface streets, showcasing the game's futuristic architecture and dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved highway ramp with yellow concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed on elevated highway ramp, following a white luxury sedan

notable_agents.action: white luxury sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: bright yellow concrete safety barrier running along the left side of the elevated ramp
curved elevated highway ramp with metal guardrails and concrete decking
distant futuristic cityscape with glowing neon signs and illuminated skyscrapers
tall modern glass office towers with reflective facades lining the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a curved elevated highway ramp at night, with the motorcycle following a white sedan. Yellow concrete barriers line the left side while the neon-lit Night City skyline glows in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with neon advertisement billboards

events.description: exits curved ramp onto straight multi-lane highway with expanded city views

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway, weaving between vehicles while passing large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: white sedan pulling ahead and maintaining distance

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements on building facades
metal safety guardrails lining the right edge of the highway
suspended road signs indicating directions above the multi-lane highway

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a wide-open multi-lane highway surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The yellow barriers disappear as the road straightens, revealing an expansive view of the illuminated downtown district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete support pillars

events.description: enters covered highway underpass, ambient lighting shifts from neon to artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through covered highway section, navigating between concrete pillars

entered.detail: solid concrete ceiling of the highway underpass with embedded lighting fixtures
massive concrete support columns lining both sides of the covered roadway
metal security fencing visible through the left side of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a covered highway underpass where the vibrant neon gives way to dimmer artificial lighting. Concrete pillars and a solid ceiling enclose the roadway, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere as traffic continues to flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: surface city street with dedicated red bike lane at dawn

events.description: exits underpass to surface level, natural dawn light visible in sky ahead
merges into right lane featuring distinctive red painted bike lane markings

agents.ego_description: navigating surface streets, following a red sedan through intersections with red bike lanes

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead, leading through the surface street intersections

entered.detail: distinctive bright red painted surface marking designating a bicycle lane on the right side
early morning sky with clouds visible between buildings, indicating transition from night
large electronic advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the motorcycle enters surface streets where dawn light begins to illuminate the sky. The road features a distinctive red painted bike lane on the right, while digital billboards and modern buildings line the urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban corridor with red illuminated ceiling structure

events.description: enters fully covered street with distinctive red illuminated ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: speeding through enclosed urban corridor with red overhead lighting

entered.detail: enclosed roof structure covering the entire street width
rows of red glowing light panels embedded in the ceiling creating dramatic red lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow enclosed urban corridor where the ceiling is lined with distinctive red illuminated panels, casting a dramatic red glow over the roadway. The dawn sky disappears as the motorcycle speeds through this covered section of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed motorcycle journey that transitions from the neon-lit heights of an elevated highway into the enclosed, atmospheric corridors of the lower city. It begins on a curved ramp following a white sedan, with yellow concrete barriers guiding the path toward a glowing distant skyline. As the road straightens into a wide multi-lane highway, the barriers vanish to reveal an expansive view of towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant advertisements before the scene shifts into a dim, concrete underpass. Emerging from the tunnel into the soft light of dawn, the camera glides along surface streets marked by a red bike lane and digital billboards. The journey finally plunges into a narrow urban corridor where the open sky is replaced by a ceiling of red illuminated panels that cast a dramatic glow over the roadway.
